canonical_name: your foggy kingdom beyond the seas
any woman who came into the court
any lady who looked so unhappy
any lady who looked so unhappy as yonder Irish queen
the most beautiful woman in the room
a child hung with jewels and pearls and golden chains which seemed too heavy for her
one who cannot receive him with grace
a slight young man, dark-eyed and dark-haired
the finest player, otherwise, that she had heard
a good husband old enough to be her grandsire
a kingdom to rule at the far end of the world
the lead and tin mines of Cornwall
the four queens who sat at this table
a man who was handsome, and no more than her own age
centurion of the Valeria Victrix legion
none who can lawfully lay claim to the purple of the emperor
